source_pr.title: pkg/executor: fix the hang issue in indexHashJoin
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #49033 

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
Fix the issue that the query hangs when it's killed by the tidb_mem_quota_query
```

symptoms: Query with `INL_HASH_JOIN` could hang or return `context canceled` when the executor is canceled in the panic/error path (Issue #49033).
failure_signature: Query hangs (or returns `context canceled` instead of the real error) when IndexNestedLoopHashJoin is canceled after a worker panic (Issue #49033).
root_cause_explanation: IndexNestedLoopHashJoin had a concurrency bug in the panic/error path: when a worker panicked and canceled the shared context, the consumer side could block on result channels or return `context canceled`, causing a hang and hiding the real panic error. The fix records the recovered panic error (`panicErr`) and centralizes result-channel reads so that when the context is canceled it returns the real error and exits cleanly.
fix_pattern: Capture/propagate the recovered panic error and refactor result-channel handling so cancellation does not hang the join executor or mask the real error as `context canceled`.

evidence: evidence: query hangs when it's killed by `tidb_mem_quota_query` (Issue #49033)

analysis:
PR title: pkg/executor: fix the hang issue in indexHashJoin
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/49218
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal, determinism_stabilization
Triage summary: query hangs when it's killed by `tidb_mem_quota_query` (Issue #49033)
Changed files (4): pkg/executor/builder.go, pkg/executor/index_lookup_hash_join.go, pkg/executor/test/jointest/BUILD.bazel, pkg/executor/test/jointest/join_test.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
